name: react-rsc-vs-ssr
description: Use the web_search tool to search for 'React Server Components vs SSR differences'. Then use the web_search tool to search for 'Next.js App Router vs Pages Router'. List which articles and documentation pages appear in both result sets. Use summarize on the overlapping sources. Log the key architectural differences to your learnings file. Save as react-rsc-vs-ssr.md with cited URLs.
